TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Quri, title = Quri, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Quri} }

S.FORM: Quri Itiniay i Fuxing Cen no Taoyuan ko Quri a niyaro', 11 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 31 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 90% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 28 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 10% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 3 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Tayal87%, roma3%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'. Quri Itiniay i Jianshi Cen no Hsinchu ko Quri a niyaro', 69 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 315 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 95% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 299 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 5% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 16 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Tayal91%, Amis1%, roma2%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'. Ira ko Kiwkay i niyaro'.
S.PHON: *o~u~uri itiniaj i fo~u~uxiŋ ʦən no~u tao~ujo~u~uan ko~u *o~u~uri a nijaro~uʡ, ** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, ** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, ** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, * ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u tajaɾ**%, ro~uma*%. ira ko~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan i nijaro~uʡ. *o~u~uri itiniaj i *iansħi ʦən no~u ħsinʦħo~u~u ko~u *o~u~uri a nijaro~uʡ, ** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, ** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u tajaɾ**%, amis*%, ro~uma*%. ira ko~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u kiwkaj i nijaro~uʡ.
S.FORM: Quri Itiniay i Fuxing Cen no Taoyuan ko Quri a niyaro', 11 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 31 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 90% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 28 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 10% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 3 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Tayal87%, roma3%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'. Quri Itiniay i Jianshi Cen no Hsinchu ko Quri a niyaro', 69 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 315 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 95% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 299 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 5% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 16 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Tayal91%, Amis1%, roma2%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'. Ira ko Kiwkay i niyaro'.
S.PHON: *o~u~uri itiniaj i fo~u~uxiŋ ʦən no~u tao~ujo~u~uan ko~u *o~u~uri a nijaro~uʡ, ** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, ** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, ** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, * ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u tajaɾ**%, ro~uma*%. ira ko~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan i nijaro~uʡ. *o~u~uri itiniaj i *iansħi ʦən no~u ħsinʦħo~u~u ko~u *o~u~uri a nijaro~uʡ, ** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, ** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u tajaɾ**%, amis*%, ro~uma*%. ira ko~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u kiwkaj i nijaro~uʡ.
